creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Ports-category: x11-servers

Here is a new extension for X window system, named Xatm.
It is a X Font Server.
And It can deal many kind of Postscript fonts!
(Actuary it use ghostscript internaly :)

NOTE: this ports requires gs. but I don't write RUN_DEPENDS line.
because our ports have many kind of gs.

Fix: Please commit following ports under x11-servers:
